name: Storj Storage
description: Manage files on Storj decentralized cloud storage — upload, download, list, share

accessGrant.label: Storj Access Grant
accessGrant.help: Serialized Storj access grant. Fallback: STORJ_ACCESS_GRANT env var.

nativeLibs: libuplink (from storj/uplink-c — place in plugin native/ dir or set STORJ_LIBUPLINK_PATH)

accessGrant.description: Storj serialized access grant (from uplink share or satellite UI). Required — obtain from satellite.storj.io or 'uplink share' CLI.
